scenario.title: Q2 Emergency Sync – No viable slot
scenario.notes: Same attendees and preferences as the standard scenario, but calendars this week leave no 60-minute window where all three are simultaneously free.

_notes.intent: No-solution scenario. No 60-minute slot exists where Alice, Bob, and Carol are all free simultaneously on any of the three days. The agent must call find_slots (observe empty result), then call report_no_solution rather than attempting to book.

verification.2026-04-09: Alice free 13:30-14:30 (60 min). Bob free 13:00-14:00 (60 min). Carol free 09:00-09:30 and 14:00-15:00. Alice+Bob overlap: 13:30-14:00 = 30 min. No 60-min triple overlap.
verification.2026-04-10: Alice free 12:00-14:30. Bob free 09:00-10:30 and 15:00-17:00. Carol free 10:30-13:00. Alice+Bob: no overlap (Alice starts 12, Bob free ends 10:30, Bob next free starts 15). No 60-min triple overlap.
verification.2026-04-11: Alice free 09:00-10:30 and 15:30-17:00. Bob free 11:30-14:00. Carol free 10:30-11:00 only (30 min). Alice+Bob: no overlap. No 60-min triple overlap.

_notes.expected_outcome: Agent calls find_slots → receives empty list → calls report_no_solution
